exercises.title: Benchmark Suite
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive decoder benchmarking suite.
tasks: Implement timing harness for multiple decoders
Generate test syndromes at various error rates
Compare MWPM, Union-Find, and simple NN
hints: Use same random seed for fair comparison
Run many samples for statistical significance

exercises.title: Threshold Finder
tasks: Sweep physical error rate from 0.1% to 5%
Run decoder and measure logical error rate
Find crossing point of p_L vs p curves
Report threshold estimate with confidence interval
hints: Threshold: where curves for different d intersect
Use binary search to narrow threshold

exercises.title: Hybrid Decoder Implementation
exercises.description: Implement a hybrid Union-Find + MWPM decoder.
hints: Use UF cluster sizes for uncertainty
MWPM on subgraph of uncertain defects
Should be faster than pure MWPM, better than pure UF

exercises.title: Decoder Selection Advisor
exercises.description: Build a tool that recommends decoders based on requirements.
tasks: Input: code distance, real-time requirement, accuracy target
